_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6 inhibition enhances SHP2 inhibitor efficacy and is dependent upon RB function in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors

details: JH-2-002 PDX used in in vivo NRG mouse xenograft study; single-agent TNO155 (SHP2i) and TNO155 + ribociclib (CDK4/6i) combination both produced antitumor effects; combination showed more profound and durable response after drug holiday and rechallenge, with extended 10-week continuous therapy demonstrating sustained benefit and significant Ki-67 reduction by IHC
